commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl delete pod uccl-probe -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found --wait=false 2>&1; echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/uccl-probe.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/uccl-probe.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs uccl-probe 2>&1 | head -60'
